source_jobs.title: Senior Java Engineer
source_jobs.description:
Maybe you’re bored and need a new challenge. Or you’re sick of all the bureaucracy and just want to focus on building kick-ass software. Or maybe you are looking for a job where you can do really great work from anywhere.

 

Whatever the reason, we want you to know that LT is different. And not just air quotes “different,” but more like “breathing easy for the first time in a long time” different.

 

It’s a place where you can write your own story and make a difference along the way. At LT, you’ll have the freedom and flexibility to do what you think needs to be done, and you’ll get to do it while working alongside a team of other curious individuals who love a good challenge too.

 

We’re currently looking to add a Senior Java Engineer to this nerd club of ours. If you’re someone who has 5+ or so years of experience, we’d love to chat.

 

Here’s what you can expect as a Java Engineer at LT:

 - You’ll join forces with 3-5 other team members to deliver high-quality, low-maintenance software solutions that help organizations cement their place in the digital economy.

 - You’ll help coach and guide client teams on the best approaches to modern software development in order to create scalable and maintainable applications.

 - You’ll use test-driven development practices to help write high-quality code.

 - You’ll continue to refine your craft and grow your skills through ongoing training, personal development and other learning opportunities that help you reach your goals.

source_jobs.title: UX Designer
source_jobs.description:
Maybe you're bored and need a new challenge. Or you're tired of shipping designs into a void and never seeing them built. Or maybe you're looking for a job where you can do great work from anywhere.

Whatever the reason, we want you to know that LT is different. Not air-quotes "different," but more like "breathing easy for the first time in a long time" different.

It's a place where you can write your own story and make a difference along the way. You'll have the freedom to figure out what needs to be done, alongside people who are curious and love a good challenge too.

We're currently looking to add a Senior UX Designer to this nerd club of ours. Five-ish years in and still learning everyday:

Here's what you can expect as a UX Designer at LT:

 - You'll help organizations design intuitive, human-centered software that cements their place in the digital economy.

 - You'll embed with a client team, owning the work end-to-end.

 - You'll work side-by-side with engineers, not toss designs over a wall, so what ships looks and works the way you intended.

 - You'll measure whether the work did what it was supposed to.

 - You'll help the people around you get better, teammates and client teams both, by sharing what you know while you're doing the work.

 - You'll speak up. If you see something that could be better, say something, no matter whose job it "is."

 - You'll keep growing through training, mentorship, and whatever else helps you get where you want to go.

Come humble and curious. Be honest about what you don't know yet. Care about the work more than the title on the process diagram.
